nodes.name: ⏰ Schedule Trigger (9AM IST)
nodes.notes: Fires at 03:30 UTC = 09:00 AM IST every day

parameters.url:
=https://api.callmebot.com/whatsapp.php?phone={{$env.WHATSAPP_PHONE}}&text={{encodeURIComponent('⚠️ *Social Poster Alert*

All videos in Google Drive folder have been posted!

Please add more videos to the folder to continue daily posting.

📅 Date: ' + $('🧠 Determine Next Video').item.json.dateIST + '
📊 Total Posted: ' + $('🧠 Determine Next Video').item.json.postedCount + ' videos')}}&apikey={{$env.CALLMEBOT_API_KEY}}

=https://api.callmebot.com/whatsapp.php?phone={{$env.WHATSAPP_PHONE}}&text={{encodeURIComponent('✅ *Daily Post SUCCESS!* 🎉

📅 Date: ' + $('✍️ Generate Caption & Hashtags').item.json.dateIST + '
🎬 Video: ' + $('✍️ Generate Caption & Hashtags').item.json.cleanTitle + '

▶️ YouTube: https://youtube.com/watch?v=' + $('▶️ Upload to YouTube').item.json.id + '
📸 Instagram: Posted Successfully

📊 Queue: ' + $('✍️ Generate Caption & Hashtags').item.json.remainingCount + ' videos remaining
⏰ Posted at: ' + new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en-IN', {timeZone:'Asia/Kolkata'}) + ' IST')}}&apikey={{$env.CALLMEBOT_API_KEY}}

=https://api.callmebot.com/whatsapp.php?phone={{$env.WHATSAPP_PHONE}}&text={{encodeURIComponent('⚠️ *Instagram Post FAILED* 

📅 Date: ' + $json.dateIST + '
🎬 Video: ' + $json.videoName + '

❌ Reason: ' + $json.failReason + '

🔧 Action needed: Check n8n logs and retry manually.')}}&apikey={{$env.CALLMEBOT_API_KEY}}

=https://api.callmebot.com/whatsapp.php?phone={{$env.WHATSAPP_PHONE}}&text={{encodeURIComponent('🚨 *WORKFLOW ERROR!*

The daily social posting workflow FAILED.

❌ Error: ' + $json.error + '
📍 Node: ' + $json.node + '
⏰ Time: ' + $json.timestamp + ' IST

Please check n8n at ' + $env.N8N_URL + ' immediately!')}}&apikey={{$env.CALLMEBOT_API_KEY}}
